subject: Customer charged, order still Pending payment
message: A customer says their card was charged, but the WooCommerce order is still marked Pending payment. They need the product dispatched today.

subject: Order emails are not reaching customers
message: The store owner receives new-order notifications, but customers do not receive processing or completed-order emails.

subject: German flat-rate shipping is missing at checkout
message: A merchant created a Germany shipping zone with a €5 flat rate, but customers in Berlin only see Local pickup.

subject: Checkout broke after a plugin update
message: After updating a discount plugin, the checkout spinner never stops and customers cannot place orders.

subject: Connection is not private after domain change
message: The store moved to a new domain. Some visitors see a certificate warning and images still load from the old address.

subject: Store became slow after page-builder installation
message: Product and checkout pages became noticeably slower after a new page builder and several add-ons were installed.

subject: Refund completed, customer has not received funds
message: WooCommerce shows a completed refund from three days ago, but the customer says the money is not back in their account.

subject: Variable product appears out of stock
message: A variable product says Out of stock on the shop page, although two size variations show stock quantities in the admin.
